risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) component of the project was canceled, and IDA grant disbursements remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, directly preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: High Political and Governance Risk Rating
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High across all assessment periods (approval, previous, and current), indicating persistent fragility in the operating environment that affects project implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating]: High [at Approval], High [Previous Rating], High [Current Rating]

risk_summary: Fiduciary risk rating has escalated from Substantial at approval to High in both previous and current ratings, likely reflecting governance fragility and implementation challenges in the conflict-affected environment.
evidence_quote: Fiduciary [Risk Category Rating]: Substantial [at Approval], High [Previous Rating], High [Current Rating]

risk_summary: Stakeholder risk has increased from Moderate at approval to Substantial in both previous and current ratings, indicating growing tensions or challenges with stakeholder engagement in the fragile operating environment.
evidence_quote: Stakeholders [Risk Category Rating]: Moderate [at Approval], Substantial [Previous Rating], Substantial [Current Rating]

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Risk in Conflict-Affected Context
risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability remains rated as Substantial, reflecting challenges in strengthening government provincial and municipal abilities in an unstable governance environment.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability [Risk Category Rating]: Substantial [at Approval], Substantial [Previous Rating], Substantial [Current Rating]
